applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)

applicable_clauses.summary: 拆分报销核查规则：同一员工、同一费用类型在7天内出现2笔及以上报销且合计达到较高审批线
applicable_clauses.applicability_reason: Expense dates 2025-06-01/2025-06-09 fall within effective period of 2025 revision

applicable_clauses.summary: 审批权限按《授权管理办法》附件二执行
applicable_clauses.applicability_reason: Delegates approval thresholds to authorization management
Referenced by Article 5 of 2025 Expense Reimbursement policy for approval thresholds

excluded_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
excluded_policies.exclusion_reason: Explicitly repealed by Article 14 of the 2025 revision effective 2025-01-01. Self-identifies as historical archive only. Expense dates June 2025 post-date both the repeal and the 2025 effective date.

version_relationships.evidence: Article 14 of 2025 revision: '原《XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)》同时废止'
